evals.prompt: I need to add the ettech parser. The newsletter comes from newsletter@ettech.com and has India's top 5 tech stories per edition.
evals.expected_output: Skill guides through: reading DESIGN.md ETtech section, reading base_parser.py, identifying need for a test fixture, implementing ETtechParser class, registering in ingestion.py, mentioning ET paywall limitation.
expectations: Reads or references docs/DESIGN.md for the ETtech parser specification
Reads or references parsers/base_parser.py before implementing
Asks for or mentions need for a real email fixture before coding
Produces an ETtechParser class that inherits from BaseParser
Mentions registering the parser in agents/ingestion.py
Mentions the ET paywall limitation and fallback to snippet

evals.prompt: Let's build the ET AI parser. It's from newsletter@economictimesnews.com, the From display name is 'ET AI', and the email has a table of contents at the top then full teasers below.
evals.expected_output: Skill guides through: variant detection by display name, referencing DESIGN.md structure, reading existing parser as reference, implementing ETAIParser with ToC-skip logic, mentioning ET paywall.
expectations: Identifies variant detection requirement — filter by From display name 'ET AI' or subject prefix 'ET AI:'
Reads or references an existing parser as implementation reference
Produces an ETAIParser class or concrete implementation plan
Mentions ET paywall handling — use snippet if scrape fails
